html: In the document, the government provides an overview of activities within the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) during the year 2025.
tldr: The government outlines what Sweden will do and work on within NATO throughout the entire year 2025.
lattlast:
The government has published a document outlining how Sweden's work within NATO will be structured in 2025. NATO is a collaborative organization comprised of many countries working together to promote security.

The document describes the activities that will take place throughout the year, detailing how Sweden will participate in the organization's collective efforts.
